tasks.label: Frontend: Start HTTP Server
tasks.command: if p=$(lsof -ti :8000 2>/dev/null); then echo "Killing process on :8000 ($p)"; kill -9 $p || true; fi; if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python -m http.server 8000 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory frontend; else exec python3 -m http.server 8000 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory frontend; fi

osx.command: if p=$(lsof -ti :8000 2>/dev/null); then echo "Killing process on :8000 ($p)"; kill -9 $p || true; fi; if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python -m http.server 8000 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory frontend; else exec python3 -m http.server 8000 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory frontend; fi

linux.command: if p=$(lsof -ti :8000 2>/dev/null); then echo "Killing process on :8000 ($p)"; kill -9 $p || true; fi; if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python -m http.server 8000 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory frontend; else exec python3 -m http.server 8000 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory frontend; fi

tasks.label: WASM: Build Package (dev)
tasks.command: wasm-pack build crates/md-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../frontend/pkg; $ver = [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow.ToUnixTimeSeconds(); (Get-Content frontend/sw.template.js) -replace '__BUILD_VERSION__', $ver | Set-Content frontend/sw.js; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "✅ WASM ビルド完了 (dev) | バージョン: $ver"

osx.command: wasm-pack build crates/md-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../frontend/pkg && VER=$(date +%s) && sed "s/__BUILD_VERSION__/$VER/g" frontend/sw.template.js > frontend/sw.js && echo "" && echo "✅ WASM ビルド完了 (dev) | バージョン: $VER"

linux.command: wasm-pack build crates/md-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../frontend/pkg && VER=$(date +%s) && sed "s/__BUILD_VERSION__/$VER/g" frontend/sw.template.js > frontend/sw.js && echo "" && echo "✅ WASM ビルド完了 (dev) | バージョン: $VER"

tasks.label: WASM: Build Package (release)
tasks.command: wasm-pack build crates/md-wasm --target web --release --out-dir ../../frontend/pkg; $ver = [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow.ToUnixTimeSeconds(); (Get-Content frontend/sw.template.js) -replace '__BUILD_VERSION__', $ver | Set-Content frontend/sw.js; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "✅ WASM ビルド完了 (release) | バージョン: $ver"

osx.command: wasm-pack build crates/md-wasm --target web --release --out-dir ../../frontend/pkg && VER=$(date +%s) && sed "s/__BUILD_VERSION__/$VER/g" frontend/sw.template.js > frontend/sw.js && echo "" && echo "✅ WASM ビルド完了 (release) | バージョン: $VER"

linux.command: wasm-pack build crates/md-wasm --target web --release --out-dir ../../frontend/pkg && VER=$(date +%s) && sed "s/__BUILD_VERSION__/$VER/g" frontend/sw.template.js > frontend/sw.js && echo "" && echo "✅ WASM ビルド完了 (release) | バージョン: $VER"

tasks.label: Frontend: Sync ROMs from roms/
tasks.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path frontend/roms | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem roms -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.bin','.md','.gen','.smd','.sms','.zip' } | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName -Destination (Join-Path 'frontend/roms' $_.Name) -Force }

osx.command: mkdir -p frontend/roms && find roms -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '*.bin' -o -name '*.md' -o -name '*.gen' -o -name '*.smd' -o -name '*.sms' -o -name '*.zip' \) -exec cp {} frontend/roms/ \;

linux.command: mkdir -p frontend/roms && find roms -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '*.bin' -o -name '*.md' -o -name '*.gen' -o -name '*.smd' -o -name '*.sms' -o -name '*.zip' \) -exec cp {} frontend/roms/ \;

tasks.label: Frontend: Generate ROM Index
tasks.command: $files = Get-ChildItem frontend/roms -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'index.json' } | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }; @{ files = $files } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 frontend/roms/index.json

osx.command: mkdir -p frontend/roms && if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then PY=python; else PY=python3; fi; "$PY" -c "import glob,json,os; files=sorted([os.path.basename(p) for p in glob.glob('frontend/roms/*') if os.path.isfile(p) and os.path.basename(p)!='index.json']); open('frontend/roms/index.json','w',encoding='utf-8').write(json.dumps({'files':files}, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(',',':')))"

linux.command: mkdir -p frontend/roms && if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then PY=python; else PY=python3; fi; "$PY" -c "import glob,json,os; files=sorted([os.path.basename(p) for p in glob.glob('frontend/roms/*') if os.path.isfile(p) and os.path.basename(p)!='index.json']); open('frontend/roms/index.json','w',encoding='utf-8').write(json.dumps({'files':files}, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(',',':')))"

tasks.label: OSS: Rust Dependency Policy
tasks.command: cargo deny check bans sources licenses

osx.command: echo 'Windows パッケージは Windows 上で実行してください' && exit 1

linux.command: echo 'Windows パッケージは Windows 上で実行してください' && exit 1

windows.command: Write-Error 'macOS パッケージは macOS 上で実行してください'; exit 1

linux.command: echo 'macOS パッケージは macOS 上で実行してください' && exit 1
